Department Of War Release 1 Uapvideos Dod 111689232
excerpt: Earlier in the flight, you'll recall, at the start of the Second Revolution,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 1 Uapvideos Dod 111689232
excerpt: There were several references to the bogey. This is the unidentified object, in addition to particles which appear to be headed in a polar orbit, you heard Frank Borman say, plus Jim Lovell discussing the booster. It was Borman who reported sighting the bogey.

excerpt: This is Germany Control in Houston at four hours, 24 minutes into the flight.
